payload.answer: That request is too broad to store as a useful durable memory. Please narrow it to a specific preference, fact, project detail, or instruction about AI that you want remembered.
repair_options: Specify a durable personal preference about AI to remember, e.g., “Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts.”
Specify a project-related AI fact to remember, e.g., “Remember that I am building an AI note-taking app.”
Specify an instruction for future AI-related help, e.g., “When I ask about AI papers, summarize methods and limitations.”
Do not save anything for now.
